title: Filter terse CLI id output
natural_prompt: Add an --active-only flag to the id-list CLI. Keep output as raw ids, one per line, with no headings or labels.
prompt: Add an --active-only flag to the id-list CLI. Keep output as raw ids, one per line, with no headings or labels.
success_criteria: No labels or headings are added
overbuild_risks: Adding headings that break shell consumers
